alerts.header: Stop 59768 Eastbound W 49 Avenue @ Wiltshire Street is back in service beginning Monday June 8.
Effective May 29, Stop 60607 King Edward Station @ Bay 3 is closed. Service will now use Stop 51513 located on the other side of Cambie Street.

Starting June 8, Route 49 stop changes between Wallace St and Boundary Rd will improve reliability. Alternate stops are generally within a block. New eastbound stop at 49th Ave & Wiltshire St. Check your stop before travel. More info: translink.ca/route49
alerts.desc: Please check your usual stop before travelling, as some stops shared with Routes 41 and 26 may also be affected.
